title: Fribourg Ultimatum Game in Schizophrenia Study
description: This dataset comprises 128-channel EEG recordings from 19 patients with psychosis and 24 healthy controls performing the Ultimatum Game at Fribourg University. Participants engaged in both proposer and responder roles across three blocks of 30 trials each, providing neurophysiological insights into decision-making and social cognition in schizophrenia spectrum disorders.
methods_description: EEG was recorded using 128 electrodes while participants performed the Ultimatum Game in a shielded room. Participants completed three blocks per role (proposer and responder), each consisting of 30 repetitions.
